title: Rich Kenyan Chickpea Stir-fry
description: A rich and chewy Kenyan dish featuring ground coriander, deglazed with a touch of gluten-free friendly ingredients to make it an energizing snack option.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions, finely grated ginger, and salt. Sauté for about 2 minutes until the onions are translucent.
Stir in garlic cloves, ground coriander, paprika, and turmeric powder. Cook for another minute to allow spices to infuse with flavors.
Deglaze the pan by adding water or gluten-free stock, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Simmer gently for 2-3 minutes until slightly reduced.
Gradually stir in chickpeas and a pinch of gluten-free flour. Cook for about 5 minutes allowing it to absorb the liquid.
Reduce heat to low-medium, cover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes or until the chickpeas are cooked through and tender.
